name: Ralco Agencies Ltd
summary: Ralco Agencies Ltd imports, distributes, and sells electrical and electronic appliances in Israel. The company offers refrigerators, LCD TVs, washing machines, microwave ovens, built-in ovens, tumble dryers, dishwashers, stoves, and vacuum cleaners. It markets its products through stores, as well as through online stores. The company was founded in 1983 and is based in Azor, Israel.
